name: 6pinochle Scorecard
author: antigravity@google.com
description: A modern, highly polished, glassmorphic scorecard tracker for 6-player (triple deck) and 4-player (double deck) Pinochle tournaments.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The port that the Go scorecard server binds to.

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: The Git repository URL containing the Go scorecard code to compile if no prebuilt server binary is uploaded.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# 6pinochle Pterodactyl Installation Script

echo "========================================="
echo "Installing 6pinochle Scorecard..."
echo "========================================="

# Update package repositories and install git
if [ -f "/usr/bin/apt-get" ]; then
    apt-get update -y
    apt-get install -y git curl ca-certificates
elif [ -f "/sbin/apk" ]; then
    apk update
    apk add git curl ca-certificates
fi

cd /mnt/server

# Check if binary already exists
if [ -f "server" ]; then
    echo "Precompiled 'server' binary detected. Skipping build."
    exit 0
fi

# Clone repository and compile
if [ -z "${GIT_REPO}" ]; then
    echo "WARNING: No GIT_REPO specified and no pre-built 'server' binary found."
    echo "Please upload a precompiled 'server' binary to your server files after creation."
    exit 0
fi

echo "Cloning repository from: ${GIT_REPO}"
# Clone into a temp directory
rm -rf temp_src
git clone "${GIT_REPO}" temp_src

if [ ! -d "temp_src" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Failed to clone git repository."
    exit 1
fi

cd temp_src

# Build Go application
echo "Building Go scorecard server..."
CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-w -s" -o ../server .

cd ..
rm -rf temp_src

if [ -f "server" ]; then
    echo "========================================="
    echo "Build successful! Ready to run."
    echo "========================================="
else
    echo "ERROR: Compilation failed. Binary not created."
    exit 1
fi
